testcase.name: Failed login due to incorrect credentials

failure.message: Expected: a string containing "Correo o contraseña incorrectos" but: was "✕ Correo o contrasena incorrectos"

testcase.failure: Expected: a string containing "Correo o contraseña incorrectos" but: was "✕ Correo o contrasena incorrectos"

testcase.name: Failed login due to empty fields

failure.message: Expected: a string containing "Error de validación en los datos enviados" but: was "✕ Error de validacion en los datos enviados"

testcase.name: Failed login due to unregistered user

failure.message: Expected: a string containing "Correo o contraseña incorrectos" but: was "✕ Correo o contrasena incorrectos"
